name: example-liquid-glass-agency
title: Liquid Glass Agency

title_i18n.zh-CN: 液态玻璃数字代理 — 暗黑高奢落地页

description: Dark, luxury single-page landing for an AI web-design agency: cinematic video backgrounds, Instrument Serif italic headings, liquid-glass cards and CTAs, BlurText word-by-word reveals, and section-by-section storytelling.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 暗黑高奢风 AI 网页设计代理单页落地页：电影级视频背景、Instrument Serif 斜体标题、液态玻璃卡片与 CTA、BlurText 逐词浮现动画，分段叙事。
description_i18n.en: Dark, luxury single-page landing for an AI web-design agency: cinematic video backgrounds, Instrument Serif italic headings, liquid-glass cards and CTAs, BlurText word-by-word reveals, and section-by-section storytelling.

query.zh-CN: 构建液态玻璃数字代理（Liquid Glass Agency）暗黑高奢单页落地页。完整规格见 en 字段（逐字遵循）：React + Vite + Tailwind + shadcn/ui + Framer Motion，黑底白字、液态玻璃效果、电影级视频背景，Instrument Serif 斜体标题 + Barlow 正文。旁附 example.html 为保真锚点——从它开始，仅替换文案与数据。
